title: Tangy Tender Greek Fish Soup
description: A quick, tangy Mediterranean fish soup with tender white fish, fresh tomatoes, lemon, and toasted walnuts, perfect for a comforting sick-day meal.

ingredients.name: Walnuts, chopped
ingredients.notes: Toast in a dry skillet until fragrant, then chop finely.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 4–5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes until softened.
Pour in vegetable stock and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Stir in lemon juice, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper; let the soup simmer for 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Add the fish fillets, cover, and cook for 6–8 minutes until the fish flakes easily.
While the fish cooks, toast the walnuts in a dry skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 3–4 minutes, then chop finely.
Remove the pot from heat and stir in the toasted walnuts.
Ladle the soup into bowls, garnish with fresh parsley, and serve hot.
